theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A Venezuelan-style pastry shop requires a warm, authentic atmosphere. The brand's sage green and cream colors dictate a natural, earthy archetype. Dark UI would feel too cold for a bakery.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium
scales.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-[#8A987A]

rules.headings: Never center by default. Left-align for flow, unless in a focused testimonial or hero center-split.
rules.pairing: Use Playfair Display for all emotional, large hooks. Use Outfit for functional readability (buttons, menus, descriptions).
rules.color: Never use pure black. Always use the dark olive tint (#2C3425) for text.

spacing_and_layout.shapes: Use 'arch' shapes for images. Replace standard border-radius with `rounded-t-full rounded-b-xl` for classic bakery windows aesthetic.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Prioritize asymmetry. Overlap elements to break rigid grids.

motion_and_3d.global_scroll: MUST use Lenis for smooth scrolling to give the site a premium, heavy momentum.
motion_and_3d.hero_parallax: 2.5D Layered Parallax using Framer Motion (`useScroll`, `useTransform`). Separate background, midground typography, and foreground floating pastry/coffee elements moving at different Y-axis speeds.
motion_and_3d.reveal_animations: Staggered fade-up and slight tilt (`rotate: 2deg` to `0deg`) for organic feel on menu items.
motion_and_3d.hover_states: Images inside arches should scale up slightly (`scale-105`) while the arch container retains `overflow-hidden`.

buttons.primary: bg-[#8A987A] text-[#F6EFDE] hover:bg-[#6C7A5D] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#2C3425] border border-[#8A987A] hover:bg-[#8A987A] hover:text-[#F6EFDE] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 font-medium

cards.menu: bg-[#EAE2CC]/40 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-[#D8CDB3] hover:shadow-lg transition-all flex flex-col gap-4
cards.testimonial: bg-[#F6EFDE] p-8 md:p-12 rounded-3xl border border-[#D8CDB3] shadow-sm relative

navigation.style: Glassmorphism header (Crystal Variant). `bg-[#F6EFDE]/75 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#D8CDB3]/50`.
navigation.features: Must include ES/EN toggle, Logo, Menu, Contact, and a primary CTA.

whatsapp_cta.style: Floating action button in bottom right. Solid `#8A987A` with a drop-shadow. Pulsing animation on idle.

sections.name: Header & Nav
sections.instructions: Sticky top, glassmorphism. Include brand logo, nav links (Story, Menu, Gallery), ES/EN toggle, and 'Visit Us' button.

sections.name: Hero (2.5D Parallax)
sections.instructions: Massive Playfair Display typography (e.g., 'El Auténtico Sabor Venezolano'). Implement scroll-driven parallax. Background layer: faint bakery texture. Mid layer: Huge typography. Fore layer: High-res cutout image of a coffee cup or croissant overlapping the text.

sections.name: About / Story
sections.instructions: Split layout. Left: Overline 'Nuestra Historia', Heading 'Tradición en cada bocado'. Right: Image inside an arch mask (`rounded-t-[200px] rounded-b-2xl`). Negative space is critical here. Use `p-12` or `p-24`.

sections.name: Menu Showcase
sections.instructions: Tabs for categories (Panadería, Pastelería, Café, Salados). Bento grid for items. Instead of generic cards, use high-quality images with hover-to-reveal descriptions. Highlight 'Cachitos', 'Pan de Jamón', 'Tequeños', 'Tres Leches'.

sections.name: Photo Gallery
sections.instructions: Mode A 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetrical grid spanning 12 columns. Mix tall portraits, wide landscapes, and empty space. Apply subtle grain texture overlay.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.instructions: The 'Editorial Ribbon' Marquee style. Extremely slow scrolling cards. High contrast serif quotes. Feature Google reviews (e.g., Elvis Coronado, Mitzel Serrano).

sections.name: Location & Footer
sections.instructions: Dark mode flip for contrast. Background `#2C3425`, text `#F6EFDE`. Left side: Address details, Hours (Abierto hasta 10 p.m.), Phone. Right side: Embedded Google Maps in a soft-rounded container. Massive logo mark at the bottom.

hero_foreground.description: Latte and croissant on table, to be used as parallax foreground.

about_image.description: Breads on display shelf. Use in the arched mask.

menu_cake.description: Tres leches cake for the menu showcase.

gallery_1.description: Sliced cake and cappuccino for gallery.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Framer Motion and Lenis for scrolling. 2. Install Playfair Display and Outfit from Google Fonts. 3. Strictly follow the color palette (no generic Tailwind slate/gray). 4. Implement the arch masks for images using `rounded-t-full`. 5. Apply the parallax rules strictly on the hero section using motion values mapped to scroll position. 6. Use the `image_urls` provided; DO NOT use placeholders. 7. All interactable elements must have `data-testid`.
